name: torn-watcher-server
description: Always-on background poller for the Torn Player Location Watcher. Reads config (API keys, watch list, Discord webhook) from a shared jsonbin.io bin, polls the Torn API, and posts to Discord. Exposes a trivial HTTP endpoint for an external keep-alive pinger (e.g. UptimeRobot) to hit so Render's free tier doesn't spin it down.
